Subject_Line: Dec 23: Christmas Email
CTA_Description: Reply to share what you're hoping for at MVU
Notes: Sent via Bizzabo by Vishen. Personal newsletter celebrating attendees joining MVU 2026. Asks attendees to reply with their intentions/hopes.
Copy_2026:
Hi Álvaro,

I just want to say this:

You've already given yourself one of the most powerful gifts of 2026.

Mindvalley U 2026 (a.k.a MVU 2026) is one of the biggest events we're creating next year, and you're part of it.

This year in Estonia, we're welcoming our highest attendance ever. And while I know you're excited, trust me, we're even more excited than you are.

When you step into Mindvalley U coming summer, you'll feel something very different from a typical event.

You'll feel presence.
You'll feel a connection.
You'll feel what it means to be in a space where learning, growth, and real human connection actually coexist.

That's what makes Mindvalley U special.

It's not just the talks on stage though those are powerful. It's what happens between the sessions.

The conversations that go deep, fast.
The friendships that form naturally.
The moments with your family that don't feel rushed or distracted.
The kind of transformation that doesn't end when the music fades — it continues over dinner, in workshops, on long walks, and unexpected conversations.

I've seen it happen year after year.

People arrive curious. They leave transformed.

Not because they tried harder. But because they finally showed up & slowed down enough to reconnect with themselves and with others.

So as you start thinking about 2026, forget the pressure of resolutions.

Instead, ask yourself a better question:

What kind of connections do I want to create this year?

In MVU 2026,
Who do I want to meet?
Who do I want to learn from?
What kind of conversations do I want to be part of?
What kind of network or even friendships do I want to build?

And here's something I'd love you to do.

Hit reply to this email and tell us what you're hoping for at Mindvalley U.

Maybe you want to find a business partner.
Maybe you're open to love.
Maybe you want a new best friend from a different country.
Maybe you're looking for opportunity, clarity, or inspiration.
Or maybe you just want a chance to have a real conversation with me.

Whatever it is, tell us your heart's desire.

Once you're inside this tribe, you're part of us.

And if there's a way we can help make something meaningful happen for you while you're there, we'll do our best to make it happen.

💌 Coming Soon 💌

Starting January, we'll begin sharing more details with you:
Speaker previews, behind-the-scenes moments, youth program highlights, and everything you need to start visualizing your summer in Tallinn.

But for now, just know this:

You're part of something special. And we can't wait to co-create it with you.

Hit reply to this email and tell us what you're hoping for at Mindvalley U.

With so much love and excitement,
Vishen
Reference_2025_Copy: [Vishen newsletter — first MVU 2026 communication after ticket purchase]

Email_Name: Why We Built Mindvalley U — by Vishen
Subject_Line: Jan 15: Why We Built Mindvalley U
CTA_Description: Encourages attendees to start booking flights/accommodation
Notes: Sent via Bizzabo by Vishen. Origin story of MVU. Storytelling email building anticipation for Tallinn 2026.
Copy_2026:
Hi Álvaro,

Back in 2016, I had a wild idea.

What if education could be… fluid?

What if instead of being bound to one campus, one curriculum, one way of learning — we could create a global, rotating campus where growth was immersive, cultural, deeply connected… and yes, even fun?

I imagined a space where my family could grow alongside me.
Where my kids could learn the life skills traditional schools forgot.
Where friendships turned into soul tribes.
And where love, business, ideas, and transformation could all happen over lunch — or a late-night walk in a new city.

That idea became Mindvalley University.

Now lovingly called Mindvalley U. Or MVU — because this experience truly is about you.

And what started as a one-time experiment in Barcelona… has now become one of the most beloved events in the Mindvalley world, spanning over a decade and touching thousands of lives from over 80 countries.

So why am I writing to you today?
Because this July, you're coming to Tallinn.

The birthplace of that idea.

And I want you to know what you've stepped into.

You're not just attending an event.
You're becoming part of a living movement.

You'll learn from world-class mentors across every area of life — from AI and social media to relationships, parenting, embodiment, entrepreneurship, and inner healing.

You'll be surrounded by people who will become your collaborators, soul friends, and sometimes, your forever people.

And your kids?
They'll be immersed in our amazing Youth Programs — often cited as the highlight of MVU both for young and adult attendees — where they're not just taught, but seen, empowered, and inspired.

This is where transformation becomes real.
Not through content, but through connection.

Whether you're coming for the first time, or are one of the beautiful souls who returns year after year, just know…

You're part of something extraordinary.

We'll see you in Tallinn.

And oh — if you haven't started looking at flights or accommodation yet, now's a good time to begin.

With love,
Vishen
Reference_2025_Copy: [Vishen newsletter — origin story of MVU, building emotional connection to Tallinn]

Email_Name: The Last Real Thing — by Vishen
Subject_Line: Jan 23: The Last Real Thing
Notes: Sent via Bizzabo by Vishen. Personal vulnerable email about turning 50, AI world context, friend-invitation upsell, and Tribe Stage teaser.
Copy_2026:
Hi Álvaro,

In my last newsletter, I shared something raw.

I turned 50 this month. And with it came a decision that now shapes everything I do: I want to live 100 lives before I die.

One week at a time.
One place at a time.
One version of myself at a time.

That's how I've started showing up.

Right now, I'm in Sevilla, Spain, leading the first-ever in-person Manifesting Coaching Certification with Regan Hillyer and 50 incredible humans.

We're not just "doing a program."

We're learning together. Laughing over late dinners. Walking through ancient streets.
And going deep with the program and with each other.

And it reminded me that, this how MVU feels for all our attendees

🌍 Why Mindvalley U Exists in an AI World

As the world races ahead with AI, automation, and digital everything…I feel a quiet urgency.

Because the more digital life becomes, the more valuable it is to gather as humans.

To sit face-to-face.
To share a conversation that meanders into the night.
To grow alongside others who are alive, awake, and building extraordinary lives — just like you.

That's what MVU is about: A living, breathing learning experience. And this year, it's going to be the biggest one yet.

At Mindvalley U 2026 in Tallinn, you'll find yourself surrounded by:

Entrepreneurs who've built global businesses — and want more meaning, not just metrics
Parents and educators raising conscious kids
Healers, artists, futurists, creatives
And yes — some of the kindest, most brilliant minds you'll ever meet

Many of these people arrive solo. But they don't leave that way.

So if you're coming alone, I want to ask you something:

👉 Bring someone with you.

Whether it's a friend, partner, colleague, or your kids— MVU becomes exponentially more powerful when it's shared.

Send them this email or invite them to grab their ticket here:

Click here to invite a friend to MVU (our early-bird offer ends this month)

🎤 A Heads-Up About Something Exciting
Each year at MVU, we open something called the Mindvalley Tribe Stage — a platform for you to teach, speak, and lead.

We'll be announcing applications for 2026 soon, but here's what you need to know now:

To apply, you'll need to have a 2-week ticket, as your talk could happen on any day of MVU
You'll have the chance to share your voice, wisdom, and ideas with an audience like no other
Whether you're an educator, coach, entrepreneur, healer — this could be your moment to give back in a powerful way

Stay tuned for updates. But if this sparks something in you — start thinking now.

What would you share? What lights you up? What's your message?

This could be your stage.

In 2026, MVU returns to Tallinn, Estonia — the birthplace of this idea.

A city where medieval walls meet modern tech.
Where history and future live side by side.
And where, this July, you'll reclaim one of the most precious experiences of our time:

✨ Connection.
✨ Belonging.
✨ Aliveness.

Let's live one of our 100 lives together this July.

With love,
Vishen
Reference_2025_Copy: [Vishen newsletter — vulnerable storytelling, friend-invite upsell, Tribe Stage teaser]

Subject_Line: The Future of Education Is Here — And Your Child Gets To Be Part of It! 🎒

Hey [First Name],

Exciting news — Mindvalley University 2026 is about to get even more extraordinary for your little ones.

For another year, Mindvalley is partnering with Learnlife, the pioneering school that's redefining education worldwide. Forget memorization — Learnlife's approach is all about self-directed learning, real-world skills, and igniting a passion for lifelong growth.

Their model is already transforming schools across Europe, the Americas, and the UAE — and now, we're bringing it once again to our Mindvalley University Youth Programs in the beautiful city of Tallinn. 🇪🇪

Imagine your child diving into hands-on, curiosity-driven workshops where they explore what truly excites them — whether it's entrepreneurship, creative problem-solving, or future-ready skills. They'll connect with like-minded peers, learn from inspiring mentors, and thrive in an environment that fosters independence, innovation, and confidence.

We can't wait to welcome your family to Tallinn this summer — where, alongside Learnlife, we'll create an unforgettable experience that empowers the next generation of changemakers.

Want to learn more about the future of education and why we're so excited about Learnlife?

👉 Read this article on our Mindvalley Blog here.

Stay tuned — more exciting details coming your way soon!

With excitement and gratitude,
The Mindvalley Events Team

Subject_Line: Why Tallinn Is the Perfect City for Your Next Big Transformation 🇪🇪
Notes: Highlight Tallinn as destination. Replace all Amsterdam references.
Copy_2026:
Hey [First Name],

Close your eyes for a second and picture this...

You're walking through the cobblestone streets of Tallinn's medieval Old Town, past towers that have stood for centuries, as the golden light of a Baltic summer evening wraps around you. The air carries the hum of cafes, the distant sound of live music, and a quiet energy that feels like possibility itself.

Now imagine that instead of just visiting, you're here for something extraordinary — a two-week deep dive into your greatest potential.

This is Mindvalley University 2026, and it takes place from July 20 to August 2 in the heart of Tallinn, Estonia.

For two unforgettable weeks, Tallinn becomes your playground for transformation.

Here's why you need to be there.

🏰 Learn, Explore, and Grow in One of Europe's Best-Kept Secrets

Tallinn isn't just another event location — it's an experience in itself.

A city where medieval meets digital — Tallinn is one of the most digitally advanced cities on Earth, yet its Old Town is a UNESCO World Heritage Site. It's where ancient wisdom and innovation coexist — the perfect setting to expand your mind and vision for the future.

A classroom without walls — One moment, you're in a masterclass with a world-class teacher. Next, you're exploring the winding alleys of the Old Town or gazing across the Baltic Sea from Pirita Beach. This isn't just learning — it's a full-body immersion into new ideas.

From sunrise meditations to unforgettable nights — Whether you're diving deep into a talk on human potential, networking with brilliant minds over dinner, or dancing under the white nights of a Baltic summer, every moment at MVU is designed for transformation.

🌟 Not a Conference. Not a Retreat. A Total Life Upgrade.

Choose Your Own Adventure: Stay for a weekend, a week, or the full two-week experience.
Learn from the Best: Our speaker lineup is filled with global thought leaders in business, relationships, biohacking, spirituality, and more.
Join a Global Tribe: You'll connect with entrepreneurs, creatives, changemakers, and seekers from over 60 countries.

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 The Only Event of Its Kind That Welcomes Your Family

If you're a parent, this is your chance to share the journey of personal growth with your kids. A full curriculum for Kids & Teens, global experiences, and friendships that last a lifetime.

Ready to experience the most transformational summer of your life?

👉 Click here to get your ticket

See you in Tallinn,
The Mindvalley Events Team

P.S. Every year, MVU sells out. If you're feeling the call, don't wait. Tallinn is waiting for you. ✈️

Subject_Line: Welcome to Week 2 — The Journey Continues ✨
Notes: Week 2 overview: registration, speakers, parties, Youth updates.
Copy_2026:
Dear [First Name],

Welcome to Week 2 of Mindvalley U 2026 in Tallinn — where the magic keeps unfolding. Whether you've been with us since Day 1 or are just joining now, this week promises powerful learning, deep connection, and nights you'll never forget.

Here's a glimpse of what's ahead:

🎟️ Registration: On Monday, July 27, registration opens at 8:30 AM. From Tuesday onward, it will start at 9:00 AM daily. Content sessions begin promptly at 10:00 AM each day — so arrive early and settle in for an inspiring start.

🧒 Youth Programs start daily at 10:00 AM.
Join us for Parent Orientation on Monday, July 27.
Stay tuned for important updates — all announcements will be shared in the dedicated Youth WhatsApp Groups.

➡️ Kids Program (6-12 years old) Parents WhatsApp Group: [Link]
➡️ Teens Program (13-17 years old) Parents WhatsApp Group: [Link]

🎤 Inspiring Talks & Workshops (Check your Mindvalley U Agenda App for full details)

[Speaker list TBD for Week 2]

About Session Feedback: In addition to the session ratings, we would love to hear your overall feedback about your experience so far. Please take a moment to share your thoughts with us here: [Link]

🎉 Unforgettable Evenings (Check your Style Guide for dress codes)

🌇 Monday, July 27 — Welcome Social
[Venue TBD], 7 PM – 11 PM
Ease into the week with fresh faces and familiar friends.

🌿 Thursday, July 30 — [VIP Party Theme TBD] (VIP & First Class)
[Venue TBD], 9 PM – 1 AM
An exclusive evening of elegance and connection.

💃 Saturday, August 1 — [Closing Party Theme TBD]
[Venue TBD], 8:30 PM – 2 AM
The grand finale. A glittering celebration to close our journey together.

Let's make Week 2 unforgettable.

Warmly,
The Mindvalley U Team

Copy_2026:
Hey [First Name],

We're still glowing from the energy of our time together at Mindvalley U in Tallinn... and if you're reading this, you're one of our cherished VIPs who we'd like to hear from.

We're currently doing something a little special. Between October 5-16, we're inviting a select few VIP ticket holders to have a personal 20-minute interview with our team.

🎯 Why are we doing this?

Because at Mindvalley, we don't just listen to our VIPs — we build around them.

Your feedback doesn't go into a spreadsheet. It shapes the future of how we design, elevate, and deliver world-class experiences at our events.

You've seen what Mindvalley can create... now imagine helping us make it even better.

If you're based in:
🌎 US or EU — Book your call with [Name] directly on this link: [Link]
🌏 Asia or UAE — Book your call with [Name] directly on this link: [Link]
🌍 Somewhere else in the world or unsure? 👉 Just fill out this quick form and we'll take care of the rest: [Link]

We'll coordinate the call at a time that works for both you and us.

And hey — we promise this won't feel like "feedback." It'll feel more like a meaningful chat over coffee (minus the caffeine jitters).

Thank you for being such a vital part of our movement. We can't wait to connect with you soon. 💛

With love,
The Mindvalley Events Team
